title: Banksy Satire Independent Studies
description: Four independent single-image studies that test Banksy Street Satire through distinct staging strategies without reference dependencies.
creative_direction: Independent studies for Banksy Street Satire: one hero image, one detail-led study, one systems-oriented composition, and one wider contextual scene.

en.title: Banksy Satire Independent Studies
